body: " The following post holders were given pre-release access of up to 24 hours prior to the release of these statistics.  Staff involved in the production and quality assurance of the statistics are excluded from pre-release access restrictions.  Ofqual   Chief Media Officer Chief Regulator Deputy Chief Regulator Senior Communications Officer Senior Manager Press and Social Media   AQA   Senior Manager – Public Relations and Media Head of Compliance   Cambridge OCR   Head of PR   Department for Education   Curriculum and Qualifications Analysis Team Leader Deputy Director of Qualifications and Curriculum Strategy Director General for Schools Director of Curriculum, General Qualifications & Digital Strategy Exams Policy Lead Exams Policy Officer Higher Statistical Officer Minister for School Standards Permanent Secretary Policy Advisor Private Secretary Private Secretary Private Secretary Private Secretary to the Permanent Secretary Secretary of State for Education Senior Media Officer   JCQ   Head of Communications  "
